docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,412.76 FILED BY HOUSE OF BRANHAM, INC. DBA NATIONAL ACCEPTANCE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT ANDALES, EMMA E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
